feedback.text: My concerns about the Digital Fairness Act: I would like to give my feedback on the Digital Fairness Act. And I think it is very important that we also talk about video games. It cannot be that publishers can simply do what they want and take away our purchased games simply because they no longer support them. Ubisoft’s ‘the crew’ is the best example: They take the game off the network and at the same time withdraw my paid licence. This is simply unfair. When I pay for something, it belongs to me, whether digital or not. Game publishers can currently do everything possible without risking any consequences. This needs to change.
